items.title: Alibaba Chair Says Business Entrepreneurs 'More Confident' After Meeting With Xi Jinping In January, Signals Hiring Boost
items.description: Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. Chairman Joe Tsai announced Tuesday the company will resume hiring, signaling growing confidence in China's business landscape following recent economic policy shifts.

items.title: Navigating The U.S. Dollar: Tariffs, Data, And Technicals
items.description: The US Dollar Index (DXY) rose to a three-week-high due to positive US business activity data and improved sentiment.

items.title: Bright Spots In Global Stocks
items.description: The U.S. equity pullback has narrowed the performance gap with the rest of the world. We see bright spots in global markets benefiting from structural shifts. Click to read.
